content.en:
"Endless Heavenly Ancestor has left the Silent Black Sea!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor immediately notified the other Heavenly Ancestors.

Immediately, he went directly to the Silent Black Sea.

The other Heavenly Ancestors did not go over immediately, but first looked at the situation before making a move.

......

Silent Black Sea.

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor turned into a wisp of invisible mist and silently blended in, and even the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor had no way of discovering his existence.

Of course, once he took away a sea of golden liquid energy, the Terrans would definitely find out, and they would definitely notify the Endless Heavenly Ancestor when the time came.

However, as long as he escaped fast enough and the Endless Heavenly Ancestor rushed back, he would have disappeared without a trace.

At that time, even if the Endless Heavenly Ancestor suspected that he had done it, as long as he didn't admit it, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor would have no choice, and it would be impossible for him to attack him for the sake of just a few golden liquid energy seas.

Soon, the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor found several golden liquid energy seas, although these golden liquid energy seas were wrapped in magic circles, they couldn't stop him.

"Close!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor released countless mist and instantly put away this sea of golden liquid energy.

Immediately, he quickly left here, preparing to collect several other golden liquid energy seas by the way.

And at this moment, a figure intercepted the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was stunned.

Didn't Ye Tian leave the Silent Black Sea, he spied on the traces of Ye Tian's departure through a secret technique, and then came to the Silent Black Sea.

But what's going on with Ye Tian in front of him?

"Doppelganger!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor instantly understood.

Ye Tian definitely has more than one real body, and he must have also practiced a clone.

And if the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor wants to have a clone, it is too difficult, and it takes an unimaginable treasure to have a clone for the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor to have a clone.

"The opportunity that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor obtained in the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap is too great, and even the Blood Transformation Realm clone has it!"

He was jealous in his heart.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, hello!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor greeted awkwardly.

And at this moment, Ye Tian was very annoyed, "Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, your dignified Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor actually sneaked into my Silent Black Pirate to obtain a sea of golden liquid energy, do you really want to provoke me?"

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, I'll just steal one, and I'll leave!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Leave the sea of liquid gold energy behind!"

Ye Tian made a move and blocked the void.

Rumble!!!

The Pole Technique instantly pierced through the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, severely damaging it with one move.

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor panicked, Ye Tian's strength was beyond his imagination.

He had never fought against a strong man like Ye Tian, but he didn't expect that he couldn't even carry a move.

"I'll hand it over!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor released a sea of golden liquid energy, and he didn't dare to leave a single drop.

And at this moment, his body has been pinched by Ye Tian, and he may fall at any time.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian threw the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor out of the Silent Black Sea with one hand, flew in the Infinite Realm Ruins for a long time, and crashed into a Infinite Ruins monster's lair before stopping.

......

"Almost died!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was terrified for the rest of his life.

Immediately, he quickly fled from here.

After a while, he met with Mihai Heavenly Ancestor and them.

At this time, Mihai Heavenly Ancestor and the others were immediately surprised when they saw that the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was seriously injured and extremely embarrassed.

"Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, what's going on?"

Mihai Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor should have a clone, it is the clone who left the Silent Black Sea, his true body is still in the Silent Black Sea, I stole a golden liquid energy sea, and I was directly hit hard by him with a move, and I was almost killed by him!"

The number of Blood Transformation Realms in the Wanlong Territorial Sea is scarce, and there are only a dozen of them, and the loss of one is a major loss.

Therefore, if there is no reason, there is no fight between the Blood Transformation Realm.

If Ye Tian relied on his strength and killed the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, the other Blood Transformation Realms would definitely be worried, so they would unite against Ye Tian.

This is also the reason why Ye Tian stopped!

"What, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is still silently in the Black Sea, and he will hit you hard with one move!" The Mihai Heavenly Ancestor and the others were also terrified, because they were also going to try it after the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor succeeded.

"It's just a sea of gold liquid energy, and he actually has a murderous intent!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was furious.

"Forget it, we're no match for him!" Mihai Heavenly Ancestor persuaded.

"Forget it, it can't be!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor said angrily.

"What else can you do?" asked Mihai Heavenly Ancestor.

"Don't forget who I am!" said the Grey Mist Heavenly Ancestor.

"Are you looking for your master, but he has already entered the territorial sea and I don't know how long it has been, is he still alive?"

Mihai Tianzu and the others were surprised.

"Of course!" the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor nodded, "My master is naturally still alive, and I contacted him once before. It's just that Wanlong's territorial waters have no value to Shizun, so Shizun is too lazy to come back. In fact, the waters of the Wanlong territorial waters are deep, how many Heavenly Ancestors have walked out of the Wanlong territorial waters? Although most of them are dead, there must be many who are still alive and have become extremely powerful. Let's just say that you all have secrets, so I won't talk about this. "

Mihai Heavenly Ancestor and several other Heavenly Ancestors were silent and did not say anything.

"Even if your master is really alive, if you call your master back, do you have to snatch the opportunity of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor? If this is not handled well, it will easily cause a big war in the territorial waters of Wanlong, and it will affect the territorial waters of Wanlong when the time comes. Your master has completely abandoned the Wanlong territorial waters, but we don't! don't make a big fuss!" said Shi Mu Heavenly Ancestor.

"Don't worry, when my master comes back, at most, he will use his strength to threaten the Endless Heavenly Ancestor and get a little benefit!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Anyway, I'm not going to get involved in this matter yet!"

Shi Mu Tianzu said.

"You can all wait and see, but don't give the news out either!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

"Don't worry, we won't reveal it!"

Mihai Heavenly Ancestor assured.

They all had a good relationship and were a small group, so it was impossible for them to reveal the news to the other Heavenly Ancestors.

......

After a period of time, the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor had almost recovered from his injuries.

On this day, he came to node two.

Immediately, he tore through node 2 and entered the territorial sea boundary rift.

As soon as he entered the boundary of the territorial waters, a cyan shield fixed the void, so that he was not swept away by the shock current.

Then, he took out a gray token and contacted his master.

Of course, if he didn't have a suitable reason, it would be impossible for his master to come back.

It is also very dangerous to travel in the gap between the territorial waters, and no one knows what will happen, so if his master comes back, he must have great benefits.

So, he told Ye Tian's growth process and the development of the human race, showing that Ye Tian definitely had a great opportunity behind him.

He believed that after this disclosure, Shizun would definitely come back.

Airplanes!

The message is out!
